subject: Sprint Review Reminder - Friday 2pm
body:
Hi Team,

This is a friendly reminder about our sprint review meeting scheduled for this Friday at 2:00 PM. We'll be showcasing the work completed this sprint and getting feedback from stakeholders.

**Meeting Details:**
Time: Friday, 2:00 PM
Zoom Link: https://zoom.us/j/your-meeting-id

**Action Items for Team Leads:**
Please prepare your demo segments in advance. Aim for 3-5 minutes per team to cover:
- Key features or improvements completed
- Any blockers or challenges encountered
- Next steps and upcoming priorities

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Best,
Internal Communications
